name: agentop-orchestrator
description: VS Code Chat Participant that delegates to the Agentop multi-agent backend — access all 11 agents directly from Copilot Chat.

chatParticipants.name: agentop
chatParticipants.description: Route tasks to any Agentop agent — soul, devops, monitor, security, review, data, comms, it, cs, or knowledge.

commands.name: soul
commands.description: Talk to soul_core — governance, goals, cluster reflection, trust arbitration

commands.name: devops
commands.description: Talk to devops_agent — git ops, CI/CD, deployment coordination

commands.name: monitor
commands.description: Talk to monitor_agent — health checks, log tailing, metrics

commands.name: security
commands.description: Talk to security_agent — secret scanning, CVE alerts, reachability

commands.name: review
commands.description: Talk to code_review_agent — diff review, architectural invariant checks

commands.name: data
commands.description: Talk to data_agent — read-only DB queries, schema drift detection

commands.name: comms
commands.description: Talk to comms_agent — outbound webhooks, incident announcements

commands.name: it
commands.description: Talk to it_agent — infrastructure diagnostics, whitelisted shell

commands.name: cs
commands.description: Talk to cs_agent — customer support, knowledge base lookup

languageModelTools.name: agentop_file_reader
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the contents of a file within the Agentop project. Returns raw file text.

path.description: Relative path to the file to read

languageModelTools.name: agentop_system_info
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve CPU, memory, disk, and OS information from the Agentop host.

languageModelTools.name: agentop_git_ops
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a read-only git command (log, status, diff, show, branch, tag, remote) on the project repo.

subcommand.description: git subcommand: log, status, diff, show, branch, tag, or remote

languageModelTools.name: agentop_health_check
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check HTTP reachability of a URL. Returns status code and response time.

languageModelTools.name: agentop_log_tail
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Tail the last N lines from a log file within the project.

path.description: Relative path to the log file

languageModelTools.name: agentop_secret_scanner
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Scan a file for hardcoded credentials, API keys, tokens, or passwords using regex patterns.

path.description: Relative path to the file to scan

languageModelTools.name: agentop_db_query
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a read-only SELECT or PRAGMA SQL statement against a local SQLite database.

db_path.description: Relative path to the SQLite database file

languageModelTools.name: agentop_alert_dispatch
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Dispatch a structured alert to the Agentop shared event log.

severity.description: Alert severity: INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL

languageModelTools.name: agentop_webhook_send
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Send an HTTP POST webhook to an external URL with a JSON payload.

languageModelTools.name: agentop_process_restart
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Restart a whitelisted Agentop process: backend, frontend, or ollama.

process.description: Process to restart: backend, frontend, or ollama

languageModelTools.name: agentop_safe_shell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute a whitelisted shell command on the Agentop host.

command.description: The shell command to execute (must be whitelisted)

languageModelTools.name: agentop_doc_updater
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Append a change record to an Agentop governance documentation file.

doc_path.description: Path to the governance doc to update

agentop.backendUrl.description: Base URL of the Agentop FastAPI backend.

agentop.defaultAgent.description: Default agent used when no slash command is provided to @agentop.

agentop.streamResponses.description: Stream agent responses word-by-word into the chat panel.
